note: GRX-009 segment 4h measured real-pass enablement telemetry: with the default-false dispatch_real_pass opt-in explicitly enabled, the tracked Godot Auto Exposure call site invoked the shipping (feature-off) Rurix bridge; the fail-closed real-pass gate returned RXGD_STATUS_FALLBACK (validation_failed via the kernel-binding-kind conformance check; unsupported_device under the forced capability downgrade) and the native Godot luminance path rendered every frame.
